title: Institute office closed for summer break: 18.7–16.8.2026
content:
Our office will be closed from the 18th of July to the 16th of August. You can still email us, we’ll reply after we return. Happy summer!

The post Institute office closed for summer break: 18.7–16.8.2026 appeared first on Finnish Cultural Institute for the Benelux.

title: Ella Prokkola selected for Zoöp Connections residency with Kunstfort Vijfhuizen
content:
The residency takes place 15 September–13 October 2026 in Vijfhuizen as part of EUNIC Netherlands’ networked knowledge exchange programme.

The post Ella Prokkola selected for Zoöp Connections residency with Kunstfort Vijfhuizen appeared first on Finnish Cultural Institute for the Benelux.

title: Start learning Finnish in Brussels or online this September!
content:
Start your Finnish language journey with the Finnish Cultural Institute for the Benelux. Classes are open to everyone, no matter where you are based. Registration closes on 28.8.2026.

The post Start learning Finnish in Brussels or online this September! appeared first on Finnish Cultural Institute for the Benelux.
snippet: Start your Finnish language journey with the Finnish Cultural Institute for the Benelux. Classes are open to everyone, no matter where you are based. Registration closes on 28.8.2026.

sourceTitle: Finnish Cultural Institute for the Benelux

title: Vilma Vanhanen selected for Zoöp Connections residency with Buitenplaats Brienenoord and Nieuwe Instituut
content:
The residency takes place 1–30 September 2026 in Rotterdam as part of EUNIC Netherlands' networked knowledge exchange programme.
